title: Web Sitcom Ideas
content:
Web Sitcom Ideas

ive never been able to take a good dick pic
know your angles
lighting
shiny? powdered? distance of camera? pov?
should i manscape?
foreskin on? foreskin off? You can’t merely decide foreskin on or foreskin off.

Do you have a specific portion of lip you kiss? Or at least feel like you get assigned. Sometimes I feel like im fighting to switch lips just for a change.


psychiatrist visits


a: i dont understand why people put stickers on their cars. a fifty cent sticker on a fifty thousand dollar car.

m: i have stickers on my car

a: so not only does a sticker show that you have poor taste in preserving your expensive purchase but it solidifies your idiot beliefs

m: yeah stupid trump stickers

a: the bernie stickers are just as stupid. stop broadcasting ideologies. i only hope my ideas are changing quicker then a sticker that says "not my president". why do you need other people to know what you think? even a design level. its dumb.
context: From document: Web Sitcom Ideas — chunk 1 (chunk 1/798)
